name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after injury, did I mess up my Utah claim?
description: Maybe if incriminating; get lawyer, proceed with report.[1]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after injury, did I mess up my Utah claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe if incriminating; get lawyer, proceed with report.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly if you admitted fault or downplayed; statements can be used against you.[1] But claim still viable if reported timely.[2] Key factors: Recorded details; what was said. Practical guidance: Get claim number; stop talking without lawyer. Review any recordings. Attorney protects from adjuster tactics.[1] Report proceeds regardless.[2]
